law.text:
Article 1. Definitions

par. 1. For the purposes of this Act, the following definitions apply:

(1) alien: any person who does not provide proof that they possess Belgian nationality.

(3) third-country national: any person who is not a Union citizen and who is not a person enjoying the Community right of free movement, as defined in Article 2, point 5, of the Schengen Borders Code.

(4) illegal stay: the presence on the territory of an alien who does not or no longer meets the conditions for entry to or stay on the territory.

(11) risk of absconding: the fact that there are reasons to believe that an alien who is the subject of a removal procedure, a procedure for the granting of international protection, or a procedure for determining or transferring to the Member State responsible for examining the application for international protection, will abscond, having regard to the criteria listed in paragraph 2.

(14) identified alien: any alien:
(a) who is in possession of a valid travel document, a valid passport, or a valid identity document; or
(b) who has been recognised as a national by the national authority of their country, which has declared itself willing to issue a laissez-passer; or
(c) who falls within the category of nationalities for which the minister may personally issue a laissez-passer.

par. 2. The risk of absconding referred to in paragraph 1, (11), must be current and real. It is established following an individual examination and on the basis of one or more of the following objective criteria, taking into account all circumstances specific to each case:

(1) The person concerned has not submitted a residence application following their illegal entry or during their illegal stay, or has not made their application for international protection within the time limit provided for by this Act.

(2) The person concerned has used false or misleading information or false or forged documents in the context of a procedure for international protection, residence, removal, or refusal of entry, or has committed fraud or used other unlawful means.

(3) The person concerned does not cooperate or has not cooperated in the context of their relations with the authorities responsible for the implementation of and/or supervision of compliance with the regulations concerning access to the territory, residence, establishment, and removal of aliens.

(4) The person concerned has made clear that they do not wish to comply with one of the following measures, or has already failed to comply with one of these measures:
(a) a transfer, refusal-of-entry, or removal measure;
(b) an entry ban that has neither been lifted nor suspended;
(c) a less coercive measure than a deprivation of liberty measure aimed at guaranteeing their transfer, refusal of entry, or removal, regardless of whether it is a liberty-restricting measure or another measure;
(d) a liberty-restricting measure aimed at guaranteeing public order or national security;
(e) a measure taken by another Member State equivalent to the measures referred to in (a), (b), (c), or (d).

(5) The person concerned is the subject of an entry ban in the Kingdom and/or in another Member State that has neither been lifted nor suspended.

(6) The person concerned has, immediately after having been the subject of a decision refusing entry or residence or a decision terminating their stay, or immediately after having been the subject of a refusal-of-entry or removal measure, submitted a new residence application or a new application for international protection.

(7) While being questioned on that point, the person concerned concealed the fact that they had already provided their fingerprints in another State bound by the European regulations concerning the determination of the State responsible for examining an application for international protection, after having submitted an application for international protection.

(8) The person concerned has submitted multiple applications for international protection and/or residence applications in the Kingdom or in one or more other Member States, which have given rise to a negative decision or which have not resulted in the issuance of a residence permit.

(9) While being questioned on that point, the person concerned concealed the fact that they had previously submitted an application for international protection in another State bound by the European regulations concerning the determination of the State responsible for examining an application for international protection.

(10) The person concerned has declared, or it appears from their file, that they came to the Kingdom for purposes other than those for which they submitted an application for international protection or a residence application.

(11) The person concerned is the subject of a fine because they submitted a manifestly unlawful appeal to the Council for Alien Law Litigation.

kb_used.fo:
vocabulary V {
  type Person
  provides_proof_of_belgian_nationality: Person -> Bool
  is_alien: Person -> Bool
  is_union_citizen: Person -> Bool
  enjoys_community_right_of_free_movement: Person -> Bool
  is_third_country_national: Person -> Bool
  is_present_on_territory: Person -> Bool
  meets_conditions_for_entry_or_stay: Person -> Bool
  has_illegal_stay: Person -> Bool
  possesses_valid_travel_document: Person -> Bool
  possesses_valid_passport: Person -> Bool
  possesses_valid_identity_document: Person -> Bool
  recognised_as_national_by_national_authority: Person -> Bool
  national_authority_willing_to_issue_laissez_passer: Person -> Bool
  falls_within_nationality_category_for_ministerial_laissez_passer: Person -> Bool
  is_identified_alien: Person -> Bool
  subject_to_removal_procedure: Person -> Bool
  subject_to_international_protection_procedure: Person -> Bool
  subject_to_responsible_member_state_determination_procedure: Person -> Bool
  reasons_to_believe_will_abscond: Person -> Bool
  individual_examination_performed: Person -> Bool
  risk_of_absconding_based_on_objective_criteria: Person -> Bool
  risk_of_absconding_is_current_and_real: Person -> Bool
  risk_of_absconding_exists: Person -> Bool
  no_residence_application_criterion_met: Person -> Bool
  did_not_submit_residence_application_after_illegal_entry_or_during_illegal_stay: Person -> Bool
  did_not_submit_international_protection_application_in_time: Person -> Bool
  false_information_criterion_met: Person -> Bool
  used_false_or_misleading_information_or_documents: Person -> Bool
  committed_fraud_or_used_unlawful_means_in_procedure: Person -> Bool
  non_cooperation_criterion_met: Person -> Bool
  does_not_cooperate_with_relevant_authorities: Person -> Bool
  non_compliance_criterion_met: Person -> Bool
  non_compliant_with_transfer_refusal_or_removal_measure: Person -> Bool
  non_compliant_with_entry_ban: Person -> Bool
  non_compliant_with_less_coercive_measure: Person -> Bool
  non_compliant_with_liberty_restricting_measure_for_public_order: Person -> Bool
  non_compliant_with_equivalent_member_state_measure: Person -> Bool
  entry_ban_criterion_met: Person -> Bool
  subject_to_unlifted_entry_ban: Person -> Bool
  new_application_criterion_met: Person -> Bool
  submitted_new_application_after_negative_decision: Person -> Bool
  concealment_of_fingerprints_criterion_met: Person -> Bool
  concealed_prior_fingerprints_in_other_state: Person -> Bool
  multiple_applications_criterion_met: Person -> Bool
  submitted_multiple_applications_with_negative_outcome: Person -> Bool
  concealment_of_prior_application_criterion_met: Person -> Bool
  concealed_prior_application_in_other_state: Person -> Bool
  declared_other_purpose_criterion_met: Person -> Bool
  came_for_purpose_other_than_application_purpose: Person -> Bool
  manifestly_unlawful_appeal_criterion_met: Person -> Bool
  subject_to_fine_for_manifestly_unlawful_appeal: Person -> Bool
}

theory T:V {
  ! p in Person: ((~provides_proof_of_belgian_nationality(p))) => ((is_alien(p))).
  ! p in Person: (((~is_union_citizen(p)) & (~enjoys_community_right_of_free_movement(p)))) => ((is_third_country_national(p))).
  ! p in Person: (((is_present_on_territory(p)) & (~meets_conditions_for_entry_or_stay(p)))) => ((has_illegal_stay(p))).
  ! p in Person: ((possesses_valid_travel_document(p))) => ((is_identified_alien(p))).
  ! p in Person: ((possesses_valid_passport(p))) => ((is_identified_alien(p))).
  ! p in Person: ((possesses_valid_identity_document(p))) => ((is_identified_alien(p))).
  ! p in Person: (((recognised_as_national_by_national_authority(p)) & (national_authority_willing_to_issue_laissez_passer(p)))) => ((is_identified_alien(p))).
  ! p in Person: ((falls_within_nationality_category_for_ministerial_laissez_passer(p))) => ((is_identified_alien(p))).
  ! p in Person: (((individual_examination_performed(p)) & (risk_of_absconding_based_on_objective_criteria(p)) & (risk_of_absconding_is_current_and_real(p)))) => ((risk_of_absconding_exists(p))).
  ! p in Person: ((((subject_to_removal_procedure(p)) | (subject_to_international_protection_procedure(p)) | (subject_to_responsible_member_state_determination_procedure(p))) & (reasons_to_believe_will_abscond(p)))) => ((risk_of_absconding_is_current_and_real(p))).
  ! p in Person: ((did_not_submit_residence_application_after_illegal_entry_or_during_illegal_stay(p))) => ((no_residence_application_criterion_met(p))).
  ! p in Person: ((did_not_submit_international_protection_application_in_time(p))) => ((no_residence_application_criterion_met(p))).
  ! p in Person: ((used_false_or_misleading_information_or_documents(p))) => ((false_information_criterion_met(p))).
  ! p in Person: ((committed_fraud_or_used_unlawful_means_in_procedure(p))) => ((false_information_criterion_met(p))).
  ! p in Person: ((does_not_cooperate_with_relevant_authorities(p))) => ((non_cooperation_criterion_met(p))).
  ! p in Person: ((non_compliant_with_transfer_refusal_or_removal_measure(p))) => ((non_compliance_criterion_met(p))).
  ! p in Person: ((non_compliant_with_entry_ban(p))) => ((non_compliance_criterion_met(p))).
  ! p in Person: ((non_compliant_with_less_coercive_measure(p))) => ((non_compliance_criterion_met(p))).
  ! p in Person: ((non_compliant_with_liberty_restricting_measure_for_public_order(p))) => ((non_compliance_criterion_met(p))).
  ! p in Person: ((non_compliant_with_equivalent_member_state_measure(p))) => ((non_compliance_criterion_met(p))).
  ! p in Person: ((subject_to_unlifted_entry_ban(p))) => ((entry_ban_criterion_met(p))).
  ! p in Person: ((submitted_new_application_after_negative_decision(p))) => ((new_application_criterion_met(p))).
  ! p in Person: ((concealed_prior_fingerprints_in_other_state(p))) => ((concealment_of_fingerprints_criterion_met(p))).
  ! p in Person: ((submitted_multiple_applications_with_negative_outcome(p))) => ((multiple_applications_criterion_met(p))).
  ! p in Person: ((concealed_prior_application_in_other_state(p))) => ((concealment_of_prior_application_criterion_met(p))).
  ! p in Person: ((came_for_purpose_other_than_application_purpose(p))) => ((declared_other_purpose_criterion_met(p))).
  ! p in Person: ((subject_to_fine_for_manifestly_unlawful_appeal(p))) => ((manifestly_unlawful_appeal_criterion_met(p))).
}

case.text: Samir is a foreign national. He resides on Belgian territory without meeting the conditions for lawful residence.

questions.text: Is there, in the case of Samir, a situation of illegal residence within the meaning of Article 1, paragraph 1, point 4?

expected.reason: Illegal stay is the presence on the territory of a foreigner who does not or no longer satisfy the conditions for entry or stay.

provides_proof_of_belgian_nationality.name: provides_proof_of_belgian_nationality
provides_proof_of_belgian_nationality.description: The person provides proof that they possess Belgian nationality.

is_alien.name: is_alien
is_alien.description: The person is an alien because they do not provide proof of Belgian nationality.

is_union_citizen.name: is_union_citizen
is_union_citizen.description: The person is a Union citizen.

enjoys_community_right_of_free_movement.name: enjoys_community_right_of_free_movement
enjoys_community_right_of_free_movement.description: The person enjoys the Community right of free movement as defined in Article 2, point 5, of the Schengen Borders Code.

is_third_country_national.name: is_third_country_national
is_third_country_national.description: The person is a third-country national: not a Union citizen and not enjoying the Community right of free movement.

is_present_on_territory.name: is_present_on_territory
is_present_on_territory.description: The alien is present on the territory.

meets_conditions_for_entry_or_stay.name: meets_conditions_for_entry_or_stay
meets_conditions_for_entry_or_stay.description: The alien meets or continues to meet the conditions for entry to or stay on the territory.

has_illegal_stay.name: has_illegal_stay
has_illegal_stay.description: The alien has illegal stay: present on the territory and not meeting conditions for entry or stay.

possesses_valid_travel_document.name: possesses_valid_travel_document
possesses_valid_travel_document.description: The alien is in possession of a valid travel document.

possesses_valid_passport.name: possesses_valid_passport
possesses_valid_passport.description: The alien is in possession of a valid passport.

possesses_valid_identity_document.name: possesses_valid_identity_document
possesses_valid_identity_document.description: The alien is in possession of a valid identity document.

recognised_as_national_by_national_autho.name: recognised_as_national_by_national_authority
recognised_as_national_by_national_autho.description: The alien has been recognised as a national by the national authority of their country.

national_authority_willing_to_issue_lais.name: national_authority_willing_to_issue_laissez_passer
national_authority_willing_to_issue_lais.description: The national authority of the alien's country has declared itself willing to issue a laissez-passer.

falls_within_nationality_category_for_mi.name: falls_within_nationality_category_for_ministerial_laissez_passer
falls_within_nationality_category_for_mi.description: The alien falls within the category of nationalities for which the minister may personally issue a laissez-passer.

is_identified_alien.name: is_identified_alien
is_identified_alien.description: The alien is an identified alien based on possession of valid documents, national authority recognition, or ministerial laissez-passer category.

subject_to_removal_procedure.name: subject_to_removal_procedure
subject_to_removal_procedure.description: The alien is the subject of a removal procedure.

subject_to_international_protection_proc.name: subject_to_international_protection_procedure
subject_to_international_protection_proc.description: The alien is the subject of a procedure for the granting of international protection.

subject_to_responsible_member_state_dete.name: subject_to_responsible_member_state_determination_procedure
subject_to_responsible_member_state_dete.description: The alien is the subject of a procedure for determining or transferring to the Member State responsible for examining the application for international protection.

reasons_to_believe_will_abscond.name: reasons_to_believe_will_abscond
reasons_to_believe_will_abscond.description: There are reasons to believe that the alien will abscond, having regard to the listed criteria.

individual_examination_performed.name: individual_examination_performed
individual_examination_performed.description: An individual examination of the alien has been performed for the purpose of establishing a risk of absconding.

risk_of_absconding_based_on_objective_cr.name: risk_of_absconding_based_on_objective_criteria
risk_of_absconding_based_on_objective_cr.description: The risk of absconding is established on the basis of one or more objective criteria listed in paragraph 2, taking into account all circumstances specific to the case.

risk_of_absconding_is_current_and_real.name: risk_of_absconding_is_current_and_real
risk_of_absconding_is_current_and_real.description: The risk of absconding for the alien is current and real.

risk_of_absconding_exists.name: risk_of_absconding_exists
risk_of_absconding_exists.description: A risk of absconding exists for the alien, established following individual examination and objective criteria.

no_residence_application_criterion_met.name: no_residence_application_criterion_met
no_residence_application_criterion_met.description: The no-residence-application criterion is met: the person did not submit a residence application after illegal entry or during illegal stay, or did not make their international protection application within the required time limit.

did_not_submit_residence_application_aft.name: did_not_submit_residence_application_after_illegal_entry_or_during_illegal_stay
did_not_submit_residence_application_aft.description: The person did not submit a residence application following their illegal entry or during their illegal stay.

did_not_submit_international_protection_.name: did_not_submit_international_protection_application_in_time
did_not_submit_international_protection_.description: The person did not make their application for international protection within the time limit provided for by the Act.

false_information_criterion_met.name: false_information_criterion_met
false_information_criterion_met.description: The false-information criterion is met: the person used false or misleading information, false or forged documents, committed fraud, or used other unlawful means in a relevant procedure.

used_false_or_misleading_information_or_.name: used_false_or_misleading_information_or_documents
used_false_or_misleading_information_or_.description: The person used false or misleading information or false or forged documents in a procedure for international protection, residence, removal, or refusal of entry.

committed_fraud_or_used_unlawful_means_i.name: committed_fraud_or_used_unlawful_means_in_procedure
committed_fraud_or_used_unlawful_means_i.description: The person committed fraud or used other unlawful means in a procedure for international protection, residence, removal, or refusal of entry.

non_cooperation_criterion_met.name: non_cooperation_criterion_met
non_cooperation_criterion_met.description: The non-cooperation criterion is met: the person does not cooperate or has not cooperated with authorities responsible for access, residence, establishment, and removal regulations.

does_not_cooperate_with_relevant_authori.name: does_not_cooperate_with_relevant_authorities
does_not_cooperate_with_relevant_authori.description: The person does not cooperate or has not cooperated with authorities responsible for implementation of or supervision of compliance with regulations concerning access, residence, establishment, and removal of aliens.

non_compliance_criterion_met.name: non_compliance_criterion_met
non_compliance_criterion_met.description: The non-compliance criterion is met: the person has indicated unwillingness to comply with or has already failed to comply with a transfer, refusal-of-entry, removal, entry ban, less coercive, liberty-restricting, or equivalent Member State measure.

non_compliant_with_transfer_refusal_or_r.name: non_compliant_with_transfer_refusal_or_removal_measure
non_compliant_with_transfer_refusal_or_r.description: The person has made clear they do not wish to comply with a transfer, refusal-of-entry, or removal measure, or has already failed to comply with such a measure.

non_compliant_with_entry_ban.name: non_compliant_with_entry_ban
non_compliant_with_entry_ban.description: The person has made clear they do not wish to comply with an entry ban that has neither been lifted nor suspended, or has already failed to comply with such a ban.

non_compliant_with_less_coercive_measure.name: non_compliant_with_less_coercive_measure
non_compliant_with_less_coercive_measure.description: The person has made clear they do not wish to comply with a less coercive measure than deprivation of liberty aimed at guaranteeing transfer, refusal of entry, or removal, or has already failed to comply with such a measure.

non_compliant_with_liberty_restricting_m.name: non_compliant_with_liberty_restricting_measure_for_public_order
non_compliant_with_liberty_restricting_m.description: The person has made clear they do not wish to comply with a liberty-restricting measure aimed at guaranteeing public order or national security, or has already failed to comply with such a measure.

non_compliant_with_equivalent_member_sta.name: non_compliant_with_equivalent_member_state_measure
non_compliant_with_equivalent_member_sta.description: The person has made clear they do not wish to comply with a measure taken by another Member State equivalent to a transfer, refusal-of-entry, removal, entry ban, less coercive, or liberty-restricting measure, or has already failed to comply with such a measure.

entry_ban_criterion_met.name: entry_ban_criterion_met
entry_ban_criterion_met.description: The entry-ban criterion is met: the person is subject to an entry ban in the Kingdom or another Member State that has neither been lifted nor suspended.

subject_to_unlifted_entry_ban.name: subject_to_unlifted_entry_ban
subject_to_unlifted_entry_ban.description: The person is the subject of an entry ban in the Kingdom or in another Member State that has neither been lifted nor suspended.

new_application_criterion_met.name: new_application_criterion_met
new_application_criterion_met.description: The new-application criterion is met: the person submitted a new residence or international protection application immediately after a negative decision.

submitted_new_application_after_negative.name: submitted_new_application_after_negative_decision
submitted_new_application_after_negative.description: The person submitted a new residence application or a new application for international protection immediately after having been the subject of a decision refusing entry or residence, a decision terminating their stay, or a refusal-of-entry or removal measure.

concealment_of_fingerprints_criterion_me.name: concealment_of_fingerprints_criterion_met
concealment_of_fingerprints_criterion_me.description: The concealment-of-fingerprints criterion is met: the person concealed having already provided fingerprints in another State bound by European regulations on determining the responsible State for international protection.

concealed_prior_fingerprints_in_other_st.name: concealed_prior_fingerprints_in_other_state
concealed_prior_fingerprints_in_other_st.description: While being questioned on that point, the person concealed the fact that they had already provided their fingerprints in another State bound by the European regulations concerning the determination of the State responsible for examining an application for international protection, after having submitted an application for international protection.

multiple_applications_criterion_met.name: multiple_applications_criterion_met
multiple_applications_criterion_met.description: The multiple-applications criterion is met: the person submitted multiple applications for international protection or residence in the Kingdom or other Member States resulting in negative decisions or no residence permit.

submitted_multiple_applications_with_neg.name: submitted_multiple_applications_with_negative_outcome
submitted_multiple_applications_with_neg.description: The person submitted multiple applications for international protection or multiple residence applications in the Kingdom or in one or more other Member States, which have given rise to a negative decision or which have not resulted in the issuance of a residence permit.

concealment_of_prior_application_criteri.name: concealment_of_prior_application_criterion_met
concealment_of_prior_application_criteri.description: The concealment-of-prior-application criterion is met: the person concealed having previously submitted an international protection application in another State bound by European regulations.

concealed_prior_application_in_other_sta.name: concealed_prior_application_in_other_state
concealed_prior_application_in_other_sta.description: While being questioned on that point, the person concealed the fact that they had previously submitted an application for international protection in another State bound by the European regulations concerning the determination of the State responsible for examining an application for international protection.

declared_other_purpose_criterion_met.name: declared_other_purpose_criterion_met
declared_other_purpose_criterion_met.description: The declared-other-purpose criterion is met: the person declared or it appears from their file that they came to the Kingdom for purposes other than those for which they submitted an application for international protection or a residence application.

came_for_purpose_other_than_application_.name: came_for_purpose_other_than_application_purpose
came_for_purpose_other_than_application_.description: The person declared, or it appears from their file, that they came to the Kingdom for purposes other than those for which they submitted an application for international protection or a residence application.

manifestly_unlawful_appeal_criterion_met.name: manifestly_unlawful_appeal_criterion_met
manifestly_unlawful_appeal_criterion_met.description: The manifestly-unlawful-appeal criterion is met: the person is the subject of a fine because they submitted a manifestly unlawful appeal to the Council for Alien Law Litigation.

subject_to_fine_for_manifestly_unlawful_.name: subject_to_fine_for_manifestly_unlawful_appeal
subject_to_fine_for_manifestly_unlawful_.description: The person is the subject of a fine because they submitted a manifestly unlawful appeal to the Council for Alien Law Litigation.

routing.question: Is there, in the case of Samir, a situation of illegal residence within the meaning of Article 1, paragraph 1, point 4?

symbolic_intent_routing.question: Is there, in the case of Samir, a situation of illegal residence within the meaning of Article 1, paragraph 1, point 4?

pipeline.natural_language: Yes. Samir: The alien has illegal stay: present on the territory and not meeting conditions for entry or stay.
